description_short: Syracuse is consistently one of the snowiest large cities in the United States due to lake-effect snow from Lake Ontario.
description_long: Located in central New York between the Finger Lakes and Lake Ontario, Syracuse averages over 120 inches of snow per year — among the highest of any US city its size — driven by lake-effect snowstorms off Lake Ontario. Onondaga County is served by NWS Binghamton (office code BGM) within forecast zone NYZ018 (Onondaga).
